analysis.reasoning: Core message: Praises a Chinese company's donation of masks to Polish schools, framing it as proof of China–Poland friendship and advocating unity/solidarity against COVID-19. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; highlights Chinese generosity/help abroad and international solidarity, portraying China positively in global cooperation. CH3 (epic history) – Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic) – Not addressed. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not about CCP governance or domestic achievements. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
